mano_cua.result_summary: Tauri 桌面应用在纯浏览器环境无法渲染。Vite dev server 正常启动但页面空白，div#app 为空。Console 报错 TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'metadata') at useWindowState.ts:13 — 因 window.__TAURI__ 在浏览器中不存在。mano-cua 尝试通过 DevTools Console 注入 Tauri 模拟对象但被 Chrome 安全机制（allow pasting）阻塞。模型列表布局功能无法在浏览器中测试。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Tauri app requires native window.__TAURI__ API which is unavailable in browser. App fails to render with TypeError at useWindowState.ts:13. Cannot test model list layout in browser-only environment.
